metadata.title: ReceiptBI - Personal Data Analyst
metadata.description: Turn files and databases into cleaned, investigated, traceable business reports.

chat.subtitle: Project investigation workspace
chat.noConnections: No database connections yet. Add one when the task needs it.
chat.noModels: No analysis capability selected. Set it when the task starts running.
chat.inputPlaceholder: Describe the work to complete, e.g. analyze this month's store performance...
chat.disclaimer: Important conclusions include evidence and should still be reviewed in context.

assistant.noChart: No chart output for this response
assistant.noPython: No Python output for this response

settings.title: Settings
settings.analysisServiceDesc: Choose the model service ReceiptBI uses to complete analysis.
settings.dataConnectionsDesc: Manage read-only database connections available to projects.

modelSettings.title: AI Model Configuration
modelSettings.description: Manage OpenAI-compatible, Anthropic, Ollama, and custom gateway models
modelSettings.name: Name
modelSettings.selectPresetFirst: Select an adapter preset first, then add your first model
modelSettings.statusUncheckedHint: A connection check has not completed yet
modelSettings.statusReconnectHint: The access credential needs to be updated
modelSettings.statusTemporarilyUnavailableHint: The service did not respond; check again later
modelSettings.statusConfigurationUnreadableHint: The saved access credential cannot be read; enter it again
modelSettings.testResultCredentials: The access credential was rejected or could not be read.
modelSettings.testResultConfiguration: The service address, protocol, or model configuration needs attention.
modelSettings.testResultTemporary: The service could not be reached. Check again in a moment.
modelSettings.testResultFailed: The connection check did not complete. Review the service settings and try again.
modelSettings.savedButConnectionCheckFailed: Service saved, but the connection check could not finish
modelSettings.addModelFailed: Failed to add model, please check config
modelSettings.updateModelFailed: Failed to update model, please check config
modelSettings.advancedConnectionDetailsHint: Review only when troubleshooting a compatible service or gateway.

form.chooseServiceHint: Start with a common service. Choose Custom Gateway when its address or protocol differs.
form.serviceAddressHint: Leave blank for an official endpoint; enter the full endpoint for a compatible service.
form.defaultService: Use as the default analysis service
form.compatibilityHint: Adjust these only when the service needs a special protocol, request headers, or connection check.
form.noKey: This service does not require an access key

connectionSettings.title: Database Connections
connectionSettings.addFirstConnection: Click the button above to add your first connection
connectionSettings.testResultFailed: Connection failed. Check the database settings and try again.
connectionSettings.testRequestFailed: Connection check could not be completed. Try again.

preferences.title: Workspace Settings
preferences.description: Default execution settings and feature toggles for single-user mode.
preferences.contextRoundsHint: New conversations include the last 1-20 rounds of context by default.
preferences.enablePythonDesc: Allow the model to return Python code and display Python output and charts in results.
preferences.enableAutoRepairDesc: When SQL or Python fails, allow the agent to auto-fix and continue within the same round.
preferences.enableDiagnosticsDesc: Show provider, connection, attempt traces, and error categories in chat results.

execution.title: Execution
execution.preprocessingDescription: Check files and connections so they can be used in investigations.
execution.selfAnalysisDescription: Generate reviewable suggestions from current data.
execution.codeAnalysisDescription: Use for complex calculations and charts.
execution.autoRepairDescription: When a query, calculation, or chart fails, correct it and continue the same investigation.

diagnostics.title: Investigation diagnostics
diagnostics.keepDiagnosticsDescription: Save investigation failures and check records.

about.description: ReceiptBI helps you prepare data, investigate questions, and keep confirmed business definitions with the current project.
about.relationsAndSemanticDesc: Relationships, metric definitions, and user corrections stay with the project and are reused in later investigations.
about.uiDesc: Business conclusions and evidence stay in the foreground; more detail is available when needed.
about.limitSingleUser: ReceiptBI is currently a local-first personal workspace without team accounts or permission management.
about.limitQueryStop: Important conclusions include evidence, but should still be reviewed in their business context.
about.limitReadOnly: Database connections are read-only by default; ReceiptBI does not modify your operational databases.
about.providerCustomDesc: Custom headers and query params via advanced settings
about.capNl2sqlDesc: Starts from a business question, then checks, joins, and analyzes the data available in the project.
about.capTraceableDesc: Keeps the data, charts, and review details behind important conclusions.
about.capAutoRepairDesc: Corrects recoverable query or analysis errors and continues the investigation.
about.capWorkspaceDesc: Reuses confirmed definitions, data relationships, and prior corrections the next time they matter.
about.repositoryDescription: View the source code and project history.
about.licenseDescription: Read the open-source license for this project.
about.issuesDescription: Report a problem or suggest an improvement.

errors.unexpectedError: The app encountered an unexpected error. Please refresh or try again.

sidebar.projectNameSaveFailed: Could not save project name, please retry

projectDefaults.initialDescription: Keep orders, stores, and confirmed business definitions here

chatHeader.projectNameSaveFailed: Could not save project name, please retry

inputBar.dropHint: Release to add it to the project
inputBar.placeholder: Ask or describe an analysis task

chatArea.waitForRun: This will be checked again after the current investigation completes.
chatArea.noChanges: Data and definitions have not changed; the current conclusion still stands.
chatArea.standingPaused: This standing watch has been paused.
chatArea.standingCompleted: This check is done; the latest result is saved with the investigation record.
chatArea.standingInvestigating: An investigation is already running for this change.
chatArea.standingNeedsAttention: Handle the data change in the project first.
chatArea.standingReasonPlaybookUnavailable: The saved analysis method is missing or ambiguous. Save the method again.
chatArea.standingReasonPlaybookChanged: The saved analysis method has changed. Recreate this standing watch.
chatArea.standingReasonPlaybookSourcesUnbound: The saved analysis method has no bound data source.
chatArea.standingReasonSourcePendingConfirmation: {source} has a new data version awaiting review. This watch will not continue until it is confirmed.
chatArea.standingReasonSourceNotUnique: A unique current data source could not be found for {source}.
chatArea.standingReasonSourceChangedSinceBaseline: Data source {source} changed after this investigation. Rerun the analysis first.
chatArea.standingReasonSourceNotReady: Data source {source} is not ready yet.
chatArea.standingReasonSourceWorkingCopyMissing: Data source {source} has no analysis-ready working copy.
chatArea.standingReasonSourceSchemaChanged: The fields in data source {source} have changed.
chatArea.standingReasonSourceVersionInvalid: Data source {source} has an invalid version identifier.
chatArea.standingReasonSourceRecipeChanged: The preparation recipe for {source} changed after this investigation. Rerun the analysis first.
chatArea.standingReasonSemanticMissing: A business definition required by this watch is missing.
chatArea.standingReasonSemanticInactive: A business definition required by this watch is unavailable.
chatArea.standingReasonSemanticChanged: A required business definition changed. Rerun the analysis first.
chatArea.standingReasonRelationshipUnavailable: A data relationship required by this watch is unavailable.
chatArea.standingReasonRelationshipChanged: A required data relationship changed. Rerun the analysis first.
chatArea.standingReasonProjectInputUnavailable: The current project state needs attention before this watch can continue.
chatArea.standingReasonRunMissing: The standing-watch run record is missing. Recreate its run state.
chatArea.standingReasonResultRejected: This standing check did not pass validation. The previous trusted result is unchanged.
chatArea.standingReasonExecutionFailed: This standing check could not finish. The previous trusted result is unchanged.
chatArea.standingResumeMissing: Standing check has no resumable investigation record
chatArea.localNotConnected: Local workspace is not connected yet
chatArea.projectStillAvailable: The current project is kept and can continue once reconnected.
chatArea.serviceSettingsNotLoaded: Analysis service settings have not loaded
chatArea.serviceSaveFailed: Could not save the analysis service, please retry.
chatArea.noAnalyzableProject: There is no project available for analysis.

messageList.reportHint: The report builds as the investigation progresses.
messageList.reportUnavailable: This investigation is not currently available
messageList.returnLatestNewAria: New progress available; return to latest

chatEmpty.title: What do you want to move forward on?
chatEmpty.loadingSuggestions: Finding what is worth asking first
chatEmpty.suggestionsRequireClick: Generate a reviewable set of analysis suggestions when useful.
chatEmpty.issuesCount: {count} items need confirmation, tap to review

analysisProgress.awaitingDesc: A business decision that affects the conclusion needs your confirmation
analysisProgress.needsAttentionDesc: Current progress is saved; resolve the prompt to continue
analysisProgress.completedDesc: The report and evidence are saved
analysisProgress.verifyingDesc: Comparing data, validating relationships, and checking anomalies
analysisProgress.understandingDesc: Identifying what is usable and which definitions need confirmation
analysisProgress.preparingDesc: Preparing the investigation and its data context
analysisProgress.contextReadyDesc: The project data and confirmed business definitions are ready
analysisProgress.savedMethodDesc: Checking current data with the saved analysis method
analysisProgress.preparingMaterialsDesc: Preparing the data needed for this investigation
analysisProgress.confirmedDefinitionsDesc: Checking the data with confirmed business definitions
analysisProgress.visualizingDesc: Generating and checking the result chart
analysisProgress.relationshipValidationDesc: Checking whether the data relationships are reliable
analysisProgress.capabilitiesDesc: Preparing the capabilities needed for this investigation
analysisProgress.businessExplanationUnavailableDesc: The data results are verified; a business explanation could not be added

analysisService.title: Analysis service
analysisService.useForNextDesc: Once an investigation starts it stays locked to this service.
analysisService.selectServiceAria: Choose analysis service; current selection is {name}

projectReports.waitingTooltip: Available after the current investigation finishes

assistantMessage.standingStartFailed: Could not start standing watch, please save this analysis again and retry.
assistantMessage.standingRetry: Could not start standing watch, please retry later.
assistantMessage.correctionKindBusinessDesc: The conclusion or business rule is understood incorrectly
assistantMessage.correctionKindBusinessExample: e.g. discounts are only promotions, not losses.
assistantMessage.correctionKindMetricDesc: Metrics like revenue or profit are calculated incorrectly
assistantMessage.correctionKindMetricExample: e.g. profit should be paid amount minus unit cost.
assistantMessage.correctionKindFilterDesc: Which records should or should not count
assistantMessage.correctionKindFilterExample: e.g. refunded orders do not count as revenue.
assistantMessage.correctionKindRelationDesc: Tables or files are joined incorrectly
assistantMessage.correctionKindRelationExample: e.g. orders and stores must join on store id, not store name.
assistantMessage.correctionKindInterpretationDesc: Numbers are correct but the cause is misjudged
assistantMessage.correctionKindInterpretationExample: e.g. growth came from a new store, not from discounts.
assistantMessage.receiptLabelCorrectionApplied: This correction is reflected in the final result
assistantMessage.receiptLabelMetricRechecked: Corrected metric used in the final summary
assistantMessage.receiptLabelRelationValidated: Coverage and expansion have been validated
assistantMessage.receiptLabelRelationReusable: The complete relation evidence can be reused
assistantMessage.receiptLabelRelationIntegrated: Joined data is part of the final conclusion
assistantMessage.receiptLabelFinalAfterRelation: Final result after the join has been rechecked
assistantMessage.appliedCurrentData: This correction was applied to the current data and rechecked
assistantMessage.rememberedNotVerified: Definition saved; execution not yet verified
assistantMessage.appliedVerifiedDesc: This report uses the corrected judgement and rechecked the current data.
assistantMessage.insufficientEvidence: There is not enough evidence to confirm this correction; please handle it before continuing.
assistantMessage.pendingReuseDesc: This understanding stays in the project; until it becomes reusable it is reverified each time.
assistantMessage.receiptSummaryVerified: This correction was applied to the current data and rechecked in the final result.
assistantMessage.receiptSummaryRelationshipVerified: This relation correction passed validation on the current data and is reflected in the rechecked final result.
assistantMessage.receiptSummaryDefinitionOnly: The investigation was rerun with this correction. It is saved as a business definition but cannot yet be verified automatically.
assistantMessage.receiptSummaryFailed: There is not enough evidence to confirm this correction; please handle it before continuing.
assistantMessage.serviceUnsupported: This service does not support the selected model.
assistantMessage.serviceResponseInvalid: The service returned content that cannot be used.
assistantMessage.serviceLocked: This investigation is locked to the original service.
assistantMessage.serviceBusy: This service cannot complete the investigation right now.
assistantMessage.insufficientRecheck: Current data is insufficient to complete the recheck.
assistantMessage.serviceNoResponse: The analysis service did not respond.
assistantMessage.serviceConnectFailed: Could not connect to the analysis service.
assistantMessage.rerunWithCorrection: Please rerun the investigation with my correction: {question}
assistantMessage.rerunRecheckNote: Please recheck the data and evidence; do not reuse the previous conclusion.
assistantMessage.resumeMissing: This investigation has no resumable record, please restart.
assistantMessage.noComparableStanding: This result has no comparable metrics, so standing watch is not available.
assistantMessage.preflightRefundQuestion: Should refunded orders be deducted when calculating revenue?
assistantMessage.preflightRefundReason: The data contains both amount and refund fields, so the selected definition can change the revenue result.
assistantMessage.preflightRefundNetAmountOption: Use the existing net amount field
assistantMessage.preflightExcelQuestion: Which worksheet should this analysis use?
assistantMessage.preflightExcelQuestionSelected: Should this analysis use the “{sheet}” worksheet?
assistantMessage.preflightExcelReason: This file contains multiple worksheets, and choosing a different worksheet can change the analysis scope.
assistantMessage.dataReadyContinue: Data is ready, continue the investigation
assistantMessage.willChangeConclusion: This changes the conclusion, your call
assistantMessage.artifactsNotLoaded: This investigation's content is not loaded yet.
assistantMessage.methodReuseHint: The same approach will be applied to similar data next time, with data and results rechecked.
assistantMessage.applyNextTime: Apply the same approach next time
assistantMessage.standingExplain: Standing watch re-runs after data changes or once a day; you are only notified when key metrics move by more than 10%.
assistantMessage.ruleRecordedNoReuse: Recorded, not yet a reusable definition
assistantMessage.ruleRecordedNotVerified: Definition saved; execution not yet verified
assistantMessage.ruleRetiredDesc: It will not be applied to future investigations; re-enable it from the Data tab.
assistantMessage.ruleRecheckDesc: This handling needs to be reverified; it will not be used automatically until confirmed.
assistantMessage.ruleOneTimeDesc: This rerun will carry the correction, but it is not yet tied to data, so it will not apply automatically later.
assistantMessage.ruleVerifiedDesc: This definition and its handling are verified; the data is reverified when it changes.
assistantMessage.ruleDefinitionOnlyDesc: Future investigations will carry this definition, but the data is not modified just because it was remembered.
assistantMessage.ruleOneTimeReportDesc: It only revalidates this report and does not become a long-term rule.
assistantMessage.correctionPrompt: Conclusion is off or the definition is wrong? Correct this understanding
assistantMessage.whichToCorrect: What do you want to correct?
assistantMessage.overallOrOtherDesc: Correct the report's overall judgement, or anything not listed
assistantMessage.recheckingDefinitions: Confirming which definitions in this report can be safely reused…
assistantMessage.saveCorrectionFirst: Save this correction first; you can opt in to making the explicit definition reusable.
assistantMessage.saveOneTime: Target could not be verified; this correction still saves but applies only to this report.
assistantMessage.saveOneTimeNoChoice: With no specific definition selected, this correction only applies to this report.
assistantMessage.useForFuture: Apply the same definition to similar questions in the future
assistantMessage.useForFutureDesc: When unchecked, this only redoes the current report; long-term use still reverifies real data.
assistantMessage.useForFutureRequire: Pick a specific business item above to enable future reuse.
assistantMessage.whichField: Which numeric field should this metric read?
assistantMessage.whichFieldDesc: Only data fields that can be rebound in this investigation are listed; saved values are still rerun and verified against real data.
assistantMessage.fieldsUnavailable: Could not load field options; retry later or save the textual definition only.
assistantMessage.noSafeFields: No safely-bindable numeric fields in this report; the textual definition still saves, but it will not pretend to execute automatically.

details.validationEvidenceAvailable: The system recorded validation evidence for this definition.
details.descriptionUnavailable: The name and business meaning need review.

editor.description: You can maintain metrics, business rules, and relationships here.
editor.owningScopeHint: The definition appears only at this level; table definitions do not spill into the whole project.
editor.bindingDescription: Choose the real table and field. ReceiptBI keeps this as a verifiable binding.
editor.derivedFormulaUnavailable: The current formula will be preserved
editor.derivedFormulaHint: This combined metric keeps its existing formula; edit only its business name, description, and owning scope here.
editor.name: Name
editor.businessDefinitionPlaceholder: Describe what it means and when it applies in business terms.
editor.synonymsPlaceholder: For example: listing date, listed at, launch time
editor.synonymsHint: Separate phrases with commas or line breaks. After adoption, they all resolve to this business definition.
editor.relationshipFieldsDescription: Select the source, table, and field on each side.
editor.jsonPlaceholder: For example: a JSON object with version and kind fields
editor.governanceHint: Confirmed and locked mean that you accept this definition; anything that affects calculations still requires execution validation.

dataWorkspace.issueUnknownFailed: A data preparation check did not complete

dataWorkspace.emptyUnderstandingHint: Once data is added, this panel shows the sources, relations, and business definitions ReceiptBI has understood.
dataWorkspace.sanitationFailed: This processing did not complete; review the hint above and retry.
dataWorkspace.sanitationRestored: Restored this cleaning method; click Reapply to use it for the current analysis.
dataWorkspace.sanitationNotDryRun: Dry run did not finish; the current analysis data is unchanged.
dataWorkspace.sanitationChanged: Data just changed; please review again before applying.
dataWorkspace.recipeSectionTitle: Cleaning methods remembered by the project
dataWorkspace.recipeSectionDesc: Review changes first; only applied after you confirm.
dataWorkspace.recipeExcludeRows: {count} rows will be excluded from analysis.
dataWorkspace.recipeNoChange: The current analysis data is unchanged.
dataWorkspace.recipeNoData: No data needs binding right now; this method stays in the project for future data.
dataWorkspace.sourceAwaitingPreparation: Source added and waiting to be prepared.
dataWorkspace.sourceNotInUse: This version is not used yet. After reviewing changes, please pick which version is used going forward.
dataWorkspace.sourceAcceptConfirm: Accepted this version; future investigations will use it and the last trusted version stays in history.
dataWorkspace.sourceRejectConfirm: Continuing with the last trusted version; this version will not be used.
dataWorkspace.sourceReviewOnly: Only re-checks and cleans; does not activate this version
dataWorkspace.sourceRetryHint: Re-tried cleaning; if changes still affect the conclusion you must confirm.
dataWorkspace.sourceRemoveHint: This source will no longer appear in the current project.
dataWorkspace.sourceAmbiguitiesHint: Found {count} business definitions that may affect the conclusion; you are only asked when the current investigation needs them.
dataWorkspace.recipeReapplied: Rechecked using the current cleaning method; changes that affect the conclusion still wait for your confirmation.
dataWorkspace.recipeStatusPending: This version of the method is still pending verification.
dataWorkspace.recipeStatusReverted: Restored an earlier version of the cleaning method.
dataWorkspace.recipeStatusVerified: This version of the method is verified.
dataWorkspace.recipeRestoreHint: Restoring does not change the current analysis immediately; you still need to click Reapply.
dataWorkspace.connectDbHint: Query existing data through a read-only connection.
dataWorkspace.relationsDesc: Shows the data sources and adopted project understanding available here.

visualCleaning.unifyDatesDesc: Normalize to a single date format
visualCleaning.unifyAmountsDesc: Strip currency symbols and thousands separators
visualCleaning.lockedHint: This cleaning method cannot be edited here.
visualCleaning.pickColumn: Pick a column to clean first.
visualCleaning.stepAlreadyAdded: This cleaning step was already added.
visualCleaning.stepDoneAtImport: This step was completed during import.
visualCleaning.staleSnapshot: Data may have changed; please re-preview before applying.
visualCleaning.readonlyNotice: This cleaning method includes steps that cannot be edited here; existing settings are kept.
visualCleaning.stepsCleared: All steps removed. Preview to confirm the update.
visualCleaning.stepsPlaceholder: Pick a column and add the cleaning you need.

investigationPicker.smartSubtitle: Choose an investigation and create an editable report
investigationPicker.manualSubtitle: Choose investigation content to add to this page
investigationPicker.emptyDesc: Complete an investigation first, then add its content to a report.
investigationPicker.draftUnavailable: Smart compose is temporarily unavailable. The report was not changed. Retry or switch to manual add.
investigationPicker.artifactHint: Title, content, and presentation can be changed after adding
investigationPicker.emptyArtifacts: This investigation has no content to add yet
investigationPicker.loadRunError: Failed to load investigation content. Please retry.
investigationPicker.loadListError: Failed to load investigations. Please retry.
investigationPicker.draftError: Smart draft didn't complete. Please try again later.
investigationPicker.existingContentPreserved: Keeps existing content and adds new pages and blocks.
investigationPicker.manualSelectDesc: The current report title and page structure stay unchanged

reportWorkspace.pickFromInvestigationDescription: Choose individual items for the current page only
reportWorkspace.reportDescriptionPlaceholder: Write a short description for this report
reportWorkspace.emptyPageDescription: Add a metric, chart, or note, or use content from an existing investigation.
reportWorkspace.loadError: The report could not be loaded. Please retry.
reportWorkspace.saveError: The report could not be saved. Please retry.
reportWorkspace.conflictError: This report changed elsewhere. Reload it before saving again.
reportWorkspace.saveBeforeExport: Save the latest changes before exporting.
reportWorkspace.pdfExportError: The PDF could not be exported. Please retry.
reportWorkspace.excelExportError: The Excel file could not be exported. Please retry.
reportWorkspace.refreshError: Could not refresh. The previous result has been kept.

reportIndex.title: Reports
reportIndex.subtitle: Organize, edit, and deliver analysis results
reportIndex.selectReportHint: Choose a report. Investigation content will be available after it opens.
reportIndex.workspaceTitle: Turn investigation results into your own report
reportIndex.emptyDescription: Add your own content, or bring in metrics, charts, and details from an existing investigation.
reportIndex.defaultDescription: Open to add pages, charts, details, and notes.
reportIndex.loadError: Reports could not be loaded. Please retry.
reportIndex.createError: The report could not be created. Please retry.
reportIndex.deleteError: The report could not be deleted. Please retry.

reportProperty.selectBlockHint: Select a block on the canvas to change its content, chart, and size.
reportProperty.title: Title
reportProperty.noFilterData: This page has no filterable data
reportProperty.filterDescription: Only charts and tables on this page that contain the field are filtered; other content does not change.
reportProperty.sourceUnavailable: The original investigation content is no longer available; the retained report content remains editable.
reportProperty.sourceEdited: This content was edited manually; the original investigation and source are still retained.
reportProperty.sourceAvailable: This block came from an investigation. You can edit it freely; the original investigation remains available.

reportBlocks.descriptionFilter: Control the data range on a report page
reportBlocks.correctionSummaryVerified: Results were recalculated and rechecked with this adjustment.
reportBlocks.correctionSummaryRelationshipVerified: Results were recalculated and rechecked with this relationship adjustment.
reportBlocks.correctionSummaryDefinitionOnly: This business definition was saved with the investigation; the result still needs a manual review.
reportBlocks.correctionSummaryFailed: This adjustment could not be confirmed and was not used in the final result.
reportBlocks.materialChange: A change worth attention was found.
reportBlocks.noMaterialChange: No change exceeded the attention threshold.
reportBlocks.evidencePreservedDetail: Open the original investigation to view the complete review record
reportBlocks.noFilteredData: No data matches the current filter
reportBlocks.unsupportedChart: This chart style cannot be displayed right now. Choose another style in edit mode.
reportBlocks.scatterNeedsNumeric: A scatter plot needs two numeric fields
reportBlocks.noFilteredDetails: No details match the current filter
reportBlocks.textPlaceholder: Write a conclusion, explanation, or next step
reportBlocks.evidenceMore: {count} more evidence items remain in the source investigation
